name: ltx23-dr34ml4y-worker
source_workflow: ltx23_dr34ml4y_i2v_v1 based on the proven CelebMaker/NextSeeder LTX I2V graph plus RuneXX LTX-2.3 settings guidance

custom_nodes.name: ComfyUI-LTXVideo
custom_nodes.reason: LTX image-to-video conditioning and audio/video latent nodes

custom_nodes.name: ComfyUI-VideoHelperSuite
custom_nodes.reason: MP4 mux/output node for final video delivery

custom_nodes.name: ComfyUI-KJNodes
custom_nodes.reason: Required by RuneXX LTX-2.3 reference workflows and useful for future split-loader migration

custom_nodes.name: ComfyUI-VideoOutputBridge
custom_nodes.reason: Expose VHS video files through the standard image output payload that Runpod uploads

core_models.notes: Primary LTX 2.3 dev checkpoint. This all-in-one checkpoint keeps native audio VAE wiring stable for v1; split Kijai files are documented in README as the follow-up migration path.
Official LTX 2.3 distill LoRA 1.1. The handler applies it lightly, default 0.30.
Latent 2x upscaler used between the two sampling stages
DR34ML4Y_LT3X_v1 action LoRA for the five CEL-180 v1 action triggers

runtime_assets.notes: Supported only for raw workflow debugging. The v1 high-level CEL-180 endpoint uses prewarmed DR34ML4Y from the network volume.

hosting_strategy.stable_core_weights: Ensure them inside the request handler or prewarm them manually; use /runpod-volume as a cache when available.
hosting_strategy.fast_changing_loras: Do not use runtime LoRA downloads for the v1 DR34ML4Y test path. Prewarm DR34ML4Y into /runpod-volume once and reuse it.
hosting_strategy.input_images: Download per-request source frames into Comfy input so LoadImage can resolve them deterministically.
